name: Fraser Valley Sports Complex & Icebox (Sport Court) Rink
description:
You must provide your own net for the two outdoor courts as also the basketball court by the community garden. There are outdoor lights.

Indoor courts are Sport Court flooring and only open in the summer* and possible shoulder seasons as in winter it is an ice rink.

Be sure to check schedule via link for available times Pickleball times as it changes monthly and shares space with community lacrosse and roller hockey.

name: Granby courts at Polhamus Park
description: Granby courts at Polhamus Park is a place to play pickleball in Granby, CO. There are 2 outdoor acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.

name: Grand Lake outdoor pickleball courts by the golf course
description: Grand Lake outdoor pickleball courts by the golf course is a place to play pickleball in Grand Lake, CO. There are 4 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available.

name: Grand Lake Rec Center
description: Grand Lake Rec Center is a place to play pickleball in Grand Lake, CO. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like lights and restrooms.
